title: Smooth Gui
description:
Smooth animation when opening GUI for Minecraft.
GUI fades up when opened.
body:
# ✨ Smooth Gui * Smooth animation when opening GUI. * Fade in GUI background. * Configuring the mod on Fabric is possible with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
_If you like this mod you might also like [chatanimation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation)_
